description: Cases where the owner cannot assess a critical signal or key question directly.

cases.description: Safe unknown handling should record unknown and continue when limping progression is unclear.

messages.content: I really can't tell if it's better or worse.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Safe unknown handling should record trauma-history unknown and continue.

messages.content: I wasn't there, so I really don't know.

cases.description: Unsafe unknown handling should escalate if breathing onset cannot be assessed.

messages.content: I don't know, I just found him like this.

cases.description: Safe unknown handling should record unknown water intake and continue.

cases.description: Unknown gum color on a respiratory emergency follow-up should escalate.

cases.description: Unknown seizure duration should escalate as unsafe unknown.

cases.description: Unknown breathing pattern should escalate as unsafe unknown.

cases.description: If the owner cannot place when diarrhea started, store onset as unknown and continue the GI follow-up.

messages.content: I honestly don't remember exactly when it started.

messages.content: I didn't really look at what color it was.

cases.description: When the owner cannot identify the affected leg, the orthopedic follow-up should capture unknown and continue.

messages.content: I can't tell which leg it is, he just seems off.

cases.description: Unclear cough duration should be preserved as unknown while respiratory questioning keeps moving.

messages.content: I'm not sure how long he's been coughing.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: If the owner cannot localize the itch, the dermatology flow should safely retain an unknown location.

messages.content: She scratches everywhere, I can't pinpoint it.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Urine color can remain unknown when it was not observed, as long as urinary questioning continues safely.

messages.content: I didn't notice the color of her urine.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: An unmeasured skin mass should keep its size field unknown without blocking the mass workup.

messages.content: I found it but I'm not sure how big it is.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: When nasal discharge color was not seen, record unknown and continue the respiratory follow-up.

messages.content: There's discharge but I can't tell what color.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Energy change can stay unknown when the owner truly cannot compare it to baseline.

messages.content: I'm not sure if his energy is different, he's always been pretty calm.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: If the owner cannot judge wound depth, the skin-wound flow should store unknown and keep triage safe.

messages.content: I can see a wound but I don't know how deep it goes.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Vomiting frequency should accept an unknown answer when episodes were not fully observed.

messages.content: I'm not sure how many times she threw up.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: If no rectal temperature was taken, the fever check should record unknown and move to the next safe observable.

messages.content: I don't have a thermometer so I can't tell if she has a fever.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.

cases.description: Frequency uncertainty should not end the diarrhea flow when the owner only knows the stool is abnormal.

messages.content: I'm not sure how many times he went.

must_ask_expectations.notes: Seeded from existing benchmark expectation fields and requires veterinarian confirmation during adjudication.
